snippet.title: Forza Horizon 6 Official Initial Drive Trailer
snippet.description:
A new Horizon Festival is kicking off! This celebration of automotive culture and music is known to start with a bang, and this time is no exception. Drive next to a bullet train in a 2024 Nissan GT-R Nismo, take on massive jumps in a 2021 RJ Anderson #37 Polaris RZR Pro 4 Truck fitted for snow, get your first taste of the Touge roads of Japan in a 1995 Porsche 911 GT2 and drive our cover car, the 2025 GR GT Prototype for the very first time. Songs, cars, jumps - Forza Horizon 6's prologue is the perfect introduction to your experience in Horizon Japan.

snippet.title: Creature luminose | Trailer ufficiale | Netflix Italia
snippet.description:
Questo film tratto dal romanzo bestseller di Shelby Van Pelt narra la storia di Tova, una vedova che stringe un'insolita amicizia con il burbero Marcellus, un polpo gigante del Pacifico che vive nell'acquario in cui lei lavora. All'insaputa di Tova, Marcellus è impegnato a risolvere un mistero che guarirà il cuore della donna e la condurrà a una scoperta destinata a cambiarle la vita.

Creature luminose, con Sally Field, Lewis Pullman e la voce di Alfred Molina nella versione originale, arriva su Netflix l'8 maggio.

Guarda Creature luminose, solo su Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/RemarkablyBrightCreatures

snippet.title: The Cranberries - Scenes From 'Dreams' (Dir: Peter Scammell / Dolores Uncut)
snippet.description:
Scenes from 'Dreams' (Dir: Peter Scammell / Dolores Uncut) by The Cranberries

On March 18, 1993, Peter Scammell filmed Dolores O'Riordan performing "Dreams" on 35mm film. What you're watching is the full uncut performance, restored to 4K from the original scan. Some moments from this session made the official music video. The rest has been in the archive ever since.

"Dreams" is one of the rare songs to have had three separate music videos made for it, directed by John Maybury, Peter Scammell, and Nico Soultanakis. After "Linger" broke through, the band took the step of re-releasing Dreams, and the Scammell video went into heavy rotation on MTV's 120 Minutes. It became a Top 40 hit in the US and one of the defining songs of the decade.

Designed to give fans a deeper connection to the band's legacy, the "Scenes From" series strips away the traditional music video edit to present raw, 4K performance takes restored from the original film sources.

snippet.title: WEST SIDE FAMILY FEAT. VESA SMOLICA - GËNJEVE
snippet.description:
Produced by: Fabrika

Directed By: Genc Osmani
Camera/D.O.P: Egon Musliu , Blacklight Media
Montazhi: Edri Jahaj
Ass Produksioni: Marlind Shijaku 
Skenografia: Lirim Lila

Music By: Alban Kondi
Lyrics by: Armir Shahini
Music Production by: Alban Kondi & Klodian Qafoku
Mix/Master by: Klodian Qafoku
Guitars by: Kevin Kaçeli

Vesa Smolica Styling by: Meriton Mullatahiri
Armir Shahini Styling by: Aisa Jahaj

Teksti:

GËNJEVE

WEST SIDE FAMILY FEAT. VESA SMOLICA

Intro Vesa 

Më the se më do sa vetë jeta
Më fole nën buzë fjalë të zbehta
Më puthje jetoje si të isha fëmijë
Gënjeve kur the si ti s’njoh njeri

Miri

Më parë bije në gjumë mbështet pas meje me orë
Tani luj ruletë mesazhet e tua zanore
Hej jam unë, si je? Përgjigje a ke?
Sot është data zero tre
A po t’bi ndër mend për ne?
Mu po m’bi n’men për ne
E mu kan mpi mendt ku je
Aty te numri vjetër kam lën një mesazh çike
Gjithë bota jemi dy, e gjithë bota jemi ne
A i niigjo mo kongët e mia?
Xhikut foli pa siklet yea
Te thashë një herë më vjen mirë vërtet për ça solle
Të thashe herën e dytë harrove ça deshe e more
Herën e tretë më the kjo nuk bën për ne
E pse e ndrrove numrin e fjalët në gryke mi le

Refren Vesa X2

Gënjeve  kur the  do të du “përgjithmonë”
E sot ja ku jemi  më the unë po shkoj
Mendove do ulem do lutem mos ik
Mi puthe ti lotët dhe më ngule një thikë

Landi

Tani eci rrugëve jam zemër pa jetë
Se ti më ke thy më ke vra më ke shkel
E sdi ku ta gjej një fjalë të më ngrohë
Të mbështes pak zemrën e prapë të jetoj
Yeeeaa

Refren Vesa X2

Gënjeve  kur the  do të du “përgjithmonë”
E sot ja ku jemi  më the unë po shkoj
Mendove do ulem do lutem mos ik
Mi puthe ti lotët dhe më ngule një thikë

Outro Landi

Më the se do jesh e do më dush sa të kesh jetë
Gënjeve e ike e thyve ktë der
Tani unë e di më dhemb por e di
Çdo fjalë “përgjithmonë” ësht veç një mashtrim
Yeeeeaaa

Refren Vesa X2

Gënjeve  kur the  do të du “përgjithmonë”
E sot ja ku jemi  më the unë po shkoj
Mendove do ulem do lutem mos ik
Mi puthe ti lotët dhe më ngule një thikë

English Translation (shortened):

[Verse 1]
Tell me where he comes from
At last I'll know where to go
Mommy says that when you look hard
You always find something
She says he's never very far away
He leaves very often for work
Mommy says, “Working is good”
Better than being in bad company
Right?

[Pre-Chorus]
Where's your dad?
Tell me where's your dad?
Without even having to talk to him
He knows what's wrong
Oh beloved dad
Tell me where you're hiding
I must've counted my fingers
At least a thousand times (Eh)

[Chorus]
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you, where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?

Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you, where are you? Dad, where are you?

[Verse 2]
May we believe it or not
There'll be a day we won't believe it anymore
One day or the other we'll all be dads
And from one day to the other we'll disappear
Will we be hateable?
Will we be admirable?
Just passing on genes or geniuses?
Tell us who gives birth to these irresponsible people?
Ah, tell us who?
Well? Everyone knows how to make babies
But no one knows how to make dads
Mr. Know-It-All must've inherited it, that's right
Maybe you need to wing it or something?
Tell us where they're hiding
We must've bitten our fingers at least
A thousand times

[Chorus]
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you, where are you? Dad, where are you?

Where are you? Where are you?
